title: Property Consultant - Embassy Office Parks REIT - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Embassy Office Parks REIT - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
